mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 4.0% signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts indicates expanding supply-side capacity, which reduces inflationary pressures and supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative when both INDPRO and HOUST show positive month-over-month growth.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly acceleration in real GDP growth combined with rising consumer spending (RSAFS) signals strong demand conditions that drive equity market optimism, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of periods where GDPC1 and RSAFS both show positive quarter-over-quarter growth.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 335 signals persistent inflation, prompting central bank hawkishness that drives bond yields higher and reduces equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 335.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and decline in unemployment (UNRATE) indicates a robust labor market, which supports corporate profit growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in 50%+ of periods where PAYEMS rises and UNRATE falls.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production signals weakening manufacturing activity, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO declines.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly decline in real GDP (GDPC1) combined with falling housing starts (HOUST) indicates weakening demand conditions, which drives equity market pessimism and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are positive in 50%+ of periods where GDPC1 and HOUST both decline.
